mapper.insert: INSERT INTO control_outbox (event_id, shop_id, event_type, payload, occurred_at, status, attempts) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{shopId}, #{eventType}, #{payload}, #{occurredAt}, #{status}, #{attempts})
mapper.select: SELECT event_id, shop_id, event_type, payload, occurred_at, status, attempts FROM control_outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY occurred_at LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE control_outbox SET status = 'PROCESSED' WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
UPDATE control_outbox SET attempts = #{attempts} WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
UPDATE control_outbox SET status = 'DEAD' WHERE event_id = #{eventId}
